ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Roasted Yellow Peas (31%), Roasted Green Peas (31%), Roasted Fava Beans (31%), Seasoning (7%) (Rice Flour, Onion Powder, Yeast Extract, Garlic Powder, Acid: Citric Acid, Parsley, Salt, Natural Flavouring, Black Pepper Powder).
